title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, former Twitter CEO, discusses the prospects for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs, examining their business models, competitive positioning, compute commitments, and capital requirements. The conversation covers IPO sequencing, platform viability of AI companies, and factors that could impact successful public offerings.
